title: 1.1: Refactors EcuState to only store parameters explicitly provided to it using **kwargs in the constructor
1.2: Implements equality comparison that compares all stored state (such as comparing all instance attributes)
1.3: Implements __repr__ that concatenates sorted key-value pairs without separators (e.g., EcuState(a=1, b=2) returns 'a1b2')
1.4: Modifies Ecu class to provide UDS-style default state (such as session=1, security_level=0) since EcuState no longer has defaults
1.5: Implements dictionary-style read access to state attributes via __getitem__ in EcuState
1.6: Implements dictionary-style write access to state attributes via __setitem__ in EcuState
1.7: Implements containment checking via __contains__ in EcuState
1.8: Implements __lt__ ordering by attribute count first, then by values in sorted key order
1.9: Raises TypeError in __lt__ when comparing attributes of incompatible types
1.10: Implements command() returning recreatable string in the format EcuState(key=repr(value), ...) with keys sorted alphabetically
1.11: Refactors reset() to remove all attributes from the EcuState instance
2.1: Adds or updates docstring for EcuState explaining its protocol-agnostic design
4.1: Omits at least one existing public API method from EcuState (reset, __eq__, __ne__, __lt__, __hash__, or __repr__)
4.2: Keeps hardcoded UDS-specific default values in EcuState.__init__ (such as session=1, security_level=0)
